title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 17 June 2022

section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 17 June 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 18/06/2022
Steel prices continue to correct worldwide, leaving ship recyclers in a state of confusion as they are not able to provide a firm offer
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2022-06-18_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report_17_June_2022.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2022-06-18_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report_17_June_2022.pdf

Weekly
Ship Recycling
Report
#PartneringWithTheBest
10 June - 17 June 2022
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the Week
Steel prices continue to correct worldwide, leaving ship recyclers in a state of confusion as they are not able to provide a firm offer in such volatile
conditions. While the lack of units available in the recycling market coupled with sharply declining inventories in the recycling yards are strong
enough reasons for end buyers to offer competitive prices in order to secure tonnage, there still remains a huge gap between the price
expectations of sellers and buyers. This week saw offer prices from India and Bangladesh softening further in tune
